name: CEU — finish Chronic Disease Management modules 8-10 before 31 October
desc: 18 of 30 hours logged. Course adds 10 more. Module 8 Thursday 15 Oct 19:00 Zoom. Cert to Board portal on completion.

name: Thanksgiving 26 Nov — grocery + prep plan, Samuel grilling
desc: Marcus home from Ridgewater. Neighbours + church friends. Confirm turkey Tue before, cornbread stuffing Wed, greens overnight. Household + hospitality separate lists.

name: Richmond 27-30 Nov — Amtrak booked, Karen briefing call Tuesday
desc: Train 175 down, 174 back. Karen carries medication tin the day I arrive. Sunday morning at Second Baptist with Mom if she's up to it.

name: Brianna 17 October debate — Meadow Hall 09:30, awards 16:30
desc: LD rounds 1-4, seeded 3 of 24. Samuel + I both attending. Uber back at 17:00, driver saved in app.

name: Advent greeter roster — 13 December confirmed
desc: Pastor David asked; Loretta covering 20 December. Coffee Wednesday after service with Pastor David, no agenda.

name: Marcus biochem — walk two mistake questions Sunday 3 PM
desc: Metabolic pathway arrows. My nursing-school trick. Protect the 3 PM Sunday call, he moved study to Saturday to keep it.

name: Lauren retainer contract — three edits sent, wait for revised draft
desc: Non-compete narrower, late-fee clause, reciprocal 15-day termination. Contract good after those edits.

name: Mom BP + fasting glucose — flag 138/88 and 178 lunch to Dr Perez if repeats
desc: Karen picked up metformin this cycle. Rice-at-lunch conversation planned Wednesday call, not lecture. Next call 10 AM Saturday.

name: Samuel benefits — FSA + skip dental plus, confirm before 3 November window closes
desc: HSA vs FSA — FSA chosen. Dental plus tier skipped, revisit at 55.

name: Dr Banks — grand rounds question for CEU November
desc: Home cuff log to continue, flag anything sustained above 135/88. Ask if Raymond can be added to the November grand rounds.

name: Loretta — Sunday 22 Nov coffee + greeters, sanctuary hall
desc: Reception scope small this year. I cover coffee + greeters, Loretta cake list. Deacon board memo one paragraph.

name: Cape May weekend of 15 November — Airbnb list Tuesday night
desc: Samuel and I. Two nights. Filter for gas fireplace + parking + walking distance to Sunset Beach. Under $250/night.
